outcome_summary: S-0192 cutover landed clean. 5 commits: migration script + tests; activity rollup + PostToolUse hook + validator extensions; verify_recall --real-data + S-0192 audits; atomic rewire of CLAUDE.md + 3 SKILLs + 3 Layer-1 ops docs + settings.json + 2 new ops docs + audit docs (with parity-drift fix as side-effect — skill_layer1_parity_drift cleared after ~30 sessions of firing); ADR 0091 + parent plan corrections (drop boot_search_results reference). Migration moved 383 curated drawers + 207 diary entries with assertions PASS + idempotent rerun verified. verify_recall --real-data verdict PASS (10/10 fixed + 5/5 plausible). T1-D CLOSED + cite-worthy gate cleared; Issue #138 receives verification_passed: true comment at session close. S-0193 picks up T1-E demolition (delete 11 mempalace_*.py + 2 hook scripts + 2 ops docs + 9 validator soft-warns + uninstall mempalace+chromadb). engine_memory_unavailable_acknowledged: MCP server not yet wired in .mcp.json — diary written via engine.memory.diary.write_entry direct python API (id 317f1313dd284139874c13ed579b8acf in diary table); user will wire engine_memory MCP entry post-session. mempalace_unavailable_acknowledged: cutover-S-0192-writes-only-to-engine-memory-per-ADR-0091 — both adoption-check tokens fire informationally for this session; downstream sessions get MCP-mediated diary writes.

scope_delivery.explanation: All scope deliverables landed cleanly: migration replay script + tests + live execution (383 drawers + 207 diary entries); activity rollup tool + PostToolUse hook + 4 validator categories + tests; verify_recall --real-data mode + 7 tests + real-data PASS verdict against migrated corpus; atomic rewire of CLAUDE.md + 3 SKILLs + 3 Layer-1 ops docs + settings.json (Stop/PreCompact mempalace removed); 2 new ops docs (engine-memory-operations.md + engine-memory-conventions.md); 2 audit reports (migration + recall); ADR 0091 + parent plan amendments dropping the boot_search_results reference; skill_layer1_parity_drift soft-warn cleared via parity reconciliation. The pushback drawer notes the settings.json sync-race surfaced mid-rewire as the only non-trivial gotcha; auto-recovery handled it cleanly per ADR 0054 amendment.

side_discoveries.reasoning: STATE.md + ENGINE_LOG forward-references to S-0193's demolition pass — these are not deferrals but explicit forward-pointers to the next scheduled session in the ADR 0091 roadmap (Issue #138 5-session plan).
